Selection based on the information provided: photos, desired style and product details.

Custom 125 Picks selection: the most visible parts to transform your Benda Napoleon without starting a full custom project. Front end, seat, engine look, rear fender and side bag: choose your style, open the product page and order through Bendago when available.
Custom 125 Picks:
This site presents selected custom-style parts with Bendago product pages. Product prices and buying details are shown on each page when available. Benda Custom Picks is independent and not affiliated with the brands mentioned.

Quick guide before ordering

A few simple checks to choose your parts without making the wrong purchase.

Are these parts compatible with the Benda Napoleon 125?

Each product page shows the available photos, price and product presentation before checkout.

Which parts change the look of a custom 125 the most?

The most visible upgrades are usually the headlight fairing, seat, compact side bags, front protection parts and small black finishing details.

How to avoid ordering the wrong part?

Compare the product photos, price and details before buying. If in doubt, ask before ordering.

Why use Benda Custom Picks?

The goal is to gather visible and useful accessory ideas for Benda Napoleon, custom 125 and bobber bikes, so you do not have to search for every part separately.

Are the links affiliate links?

Some links may be affiliate links. This does not change the price for you, but it can help support the Benda Custom Picks project.
